cannot_assert: Styling differences do not add biological evidence or change the underlying embedding.
confirmed: All three panels reuse the same UMAP coordinates and cell_type annotations; arrows and halo are decorative annotations.
interpretable: Clean, annotation-arrow, and dark-nebula variants can be compared without confusing their semantic roles.
recommendation: Keep the revised composite with the shortened panel-C subtitle.
visible: All three panel titles, subtitles, labels, and plot boundaries are visible without clipping in both sizes.
